title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: In Kottarakara, it’s a test of personal loyalty versus party machinery
description: With former CPI(M) MLA P. Aisha Potty now challenging LDF’s K.N. Balagopal as a Congress candidate and R. Reshmi’s move from the UDF to the NDA camp, the election in Kottarakara will test if personal loyalty can outweigh party allegiances in the region.
